chapter_title.ar: باب الْحَدِّ الَّذِي يُدْخَلُ بِالْمَرْأَةِ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – The (age) limit which the woman can be copulated with

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/138)
text: لَا يُدْخَلْ بِالْجَارِيَةِ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ لَهَا تِسْعُ سِنِينَ أَوْ عَشْرُ سِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Musa Bin Bakr, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘One cannot copulated with the girl until there come to her nine years, or ten years’.
en.sarwar: 3. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah from Safwan ibn Yahya from Musa ibn Bakr from Zurarah who has said the following: (...Consult Fatwah about this Hadith)
